description: Letter of Hillel b. Ṣadoq Av Bet Din, Fustat, to Ḥalfon b. Netanʾel. Dating: probably 1132. Although only a small section from the beginning and the end of the letter with very little other content has been preserved, the very fact of a connection between the writer and the recipient is, according to Friedman, noteworthy. (Information from Goitein and Friedman)
description_he: מכתב מהלל בן צדוק אב בית דין, פוסטאט, לחלפון בן נתנאל; כנראה 1132 לספירה; שמור רק קטע קטן מהתחלה והסוף
